documents_original_name_safe.name: documents_original_name_safe
documents_original_name_safe.value:
char_length(btrim("documents"."original_name")) > 0
        and position('/' in "documents"."original_name") = 0
        and position(chr(92) in "documents"."original_name") = 0

documents_storage_key_safe.name: documents_storage_key_safe
documents_storage_key_safe.value:
char_length(btrim("documents"."storage_key")) > 0
        and left("documents"."storage_key", 1) <> '/'
        and position('..' in "documents"."storage_key") = 0
        and position(chr(92) in "documents"."storage_key") = 0

integration_outbox_completed_at_matches_.name: integration_outbox_completed_at_matches_status
integration_outbox_completed_at_matches_.value:
("integration_outbox"."status" = 'completed' and "integration_outbox"."completed_at" is not null)
        or ("integration_outbox"."status" <> 'completed' and "integration_outbox"."completed_at" is null)

max_bot_outbox_completed_at_matches_stat.name: max_bot_outbox_completed_at_matches_status
max_bot_outbox_completed_at_matches_stat.value:
("max_bot_outbox"."status" = 'completed' and "max_bot_outbox"."completed_at" is not null)
        or ("max_bot_outbox"."status" <> 'completed' and "max_bot_outbox"."completed_at" is null)

max_users_optional_names_not_blank.name: max_users_optional_names_not_blank
max_users_optional_names_not_blank.value:
("max_users"."last_name" is null or char_length(btrim("max_users"."last_name")) > 0)
        and ("max_users"."username" is null or char_length(btrim("max_users"."username")) > 0)

sessions_verified_contact_consistent.name: sessions_verified_contact_consistent
sessions_verified_contact_consistent.value:
("sessions"."verified_phone" is null and "sessions"."phone_verified_at" is null)
        or ("sessions"."verified_phone" is not null and "sessions"."phone_verified_at" is not null)

submissions_location_present.name: submissions_location_present
submissions_location_present.value:
("submissions"."city" is null or char_length(btrim("submissions"."city")) > 0)
        and ("submissions"."region" is null or char_length(btrim("submissions"."region")) > 0)
        and ("submissions"."city" is not null or "submissions"."region" is not null)

webhook_inbox_processed_at_matches_statu.name: webhook_inbox_processed_at_matches_status
webhook_inbox_processed_at_matches_statu.value:
("webhook_inbox"."status" = 'processed' and "webhook_inbox"."processed_at" is not null)
        or ("webhook_inbox"."status" <> 'processed' and "webhook_inbox"."processed_at" is null)
